message:
Update rich_rust dependency from pre-release/git ref to crates.io v0.2.0

The rich_rust library (Rust port of Python's Rich) has been published
to crates.io as v0.2.0. This commit migrates the dependency declaration
from the older 0.1.1 version to the canonical crates.io 0.2.0 release.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -68,7 +68,7 @@ regex = "1"
 tracing = "0.1"
 
 # Rich console output (optional, used by sqlmodel-console)
-rich_rust = "0.1.1"
+rich_rust = "0.2.0"
 
 # Internal crates
 sqlmodel = { path = "crates/sqlmodel", version = "0.2.0" }
